arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona head to Leganes this weekend bidding to extend their lead in the La Liga title race. Hansi Flick’s treble-chasing side face a Leganes team battling to preserve their top-flight status. The Catalans enter the game on the back of a 4-0 thrashing of Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League quarter-finals. That win extended their […] The post Barcelona XI vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: For Messi, fairytale return to Barca looking increasingly unlikely
arts.sum: Lionel Messi’s current deal with Inter Miami is set to expire at the end of this year, but the rumors say that it is becoming more and more likely he will remain in Miami for the rest of his career. Inter Miami owner Jorge Mas: When Lionel Messi finishes his career, he will be a business partner for me, my brother and David Beckham.

arts.ttl: Raphinha is a rare breed: a winger who defends and puts up monster numbers
arts.sum: What’s interesting about Raphinha, however, is he’s not like Messi, and he’s not like Robert Lewandowski or Cristiano Ronaldo, either, or any player who has put up this kind of single-season stats in the Champions League. But in just 11 Champions League games, he has 12 goals and 7 assists.
